sous_titres.text: Come up here and solve this problem
Hey, hey, that's enough of that.
Go to the board and solve the problem.

like he did that 10th grader last week.

Where do you think you're going, geek?

Look, I didn't mean to trip you, it was an accident.
I think it's time for you to have an accident.
Didn't they teach you self-defense in Boy Scouts?
Looks like the only thing you know how to do is bleed!
- Hey, hey, are you okay? - Yeah.
Now we're both gonna be in trouble.

and I sort of like your nose.
I don't wanna talk about it.
It looks like somebody got into a fight.

always turn the other cheek and you should never fight.
If you don't wanna tell me about it, that's okay, okay?
You tell me when you're ready.
Do you wanna tell me what's wrong?
Well, to start off, everyone at school makes fun of me,
I got no friends, nobody likes me,
and the saddest part is, I don't even know if I like myself.
Sweetheart, you are a loving, caring, wonderful boy.
Why would you say such a thing?
I don't know mom, maybe it's this place.

That was one of the best weekends of my life.

and I can't miss any work.

You really want this, don't you?
Not only do I want this, I need it.

I have to work, so I was hoping that maybe
you and Dad could pick up the kids for the weekend?
I will come up and personally
pick the kids up tomorrow morning.
Really? Are you sure it's no trouble?
Of course. Who's their favorite uncle?
All right, then I'll be there to see you.
Joey, the kids are gonna be so happy.

is on his way, so you need to start packing.
Woo, wow, you should grow more.

Thank you for coming to get them.
We're gonna have a great weekend, aren't we?
They need a good weekend away.
Here let's hug it out, buddy.
All right, now give me your stuff.

Take good care of your sister.

You take care of my babies.

because he doesn't have any friends.

to be living at home with your parents?

Just the other day, I was on my bike

You know, just go. Hit the open road.
I can see me now, the wind blowing in my hair.
